question: <statistical method>
description: Extract all statistical methods explicitly reported in the Association Test Method column. If multiple methods are reported in one study, split them into separate entries.

question: <variables>
description: Extract all variables explicitly reported in the Independent Variable Unit and Dependent Variable Unit columns.

answers.variable: electron transport rate (not applicable | μmol⋅m^−2 ⋅ s^−1
leaf angle (with three regions of the canopy: lower is nodes 1-5 from ground, middle is nodes 6-11, upper is nodes >11)
difference of canopy and air temperatures (Tc - Ta)
mean value of Gaussian distribution of excess green index for maize canopy (MGDEXG)
quantum yield of photosystem II photochemistry (ΦPSII)
area under daily pressure probe data (PPA)
